channel.title: Virtual Machines on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Virtual Machines on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Dl/D/E v7 Virtual Machines
item.description:
Azure has made Dl/D/E v7 virtual machines generally available. The new general-purpose and memory-optimized VMs use Intel Xeon 6 (Granite Rapids) processors and claim up to 20% better general compute performance.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: End of life reminder of NVv3 and NVv4-series Azure virtual machine in Azure Batch pools
item.description:
Microsoft Azure will end support for NVv3 and NVv4-series virtual machines in Azure Batch pools on September 30, 2026. The notice lists affected NVv3 sizes, including Standard_NV12s_v3, NV12hs_v3, NV24s_v3, NV24ms_v3, NV32ms_v3, and NV48s_v3.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: DCesv6, DCedsv6, ECesv6, and ECedsv6 confidential VMs
item.description:
Azure announced general availability of the DCesv6, DCedsv6, ECesv6, and ECedsv6 confidential VM series based on 5th Gen Intel Xeon processors with Intel Trust Domain Extensions (TDX).

  • Source: Azure Updates
